title: RandomDirtDrops
description: RandomDirtDrops is a fun Minecraft data pack that makes breaking dirt blocks drop completely random items from the entire game — from diamonds to dragon eggs! Perfect for chaotic survival challenges and OP item speedruns.
body:
# 🟫 RandomDirtDrops


## 💥 Turn Dirt Into Chaos!
Break a simple dirt block… and receive anything from a stick to a Netherite sword — or maybe even a dragon egg. This chaotic, fun, and challenging datapack makes dirt blocks drop completely random items from Minecraft’s item pool.

Whether you're doing a randomizer survival challenge or just want a fun twist to your gameplay, RandomDirtDrops is for you.

# 🎮 Gameplay Highlights
•Break any dirt block to receive random items (from 1000+ vanilla items).

•Compatible with Survival and Adventure mode.

•Works in singleplayer and multiplayer worlds.

•Includes coarse dirt and rooted dirt (v1.1+).

•Endless fun for streamers, YouTubers, or chaotic friends!

# 🧪 Want More Chaos?
Use it with Veinminer or Silk Touch Tweaks for even crazier gameplay:

Combine with Veinminer to instantly break many dirt blocks.

Use with Silk Touch to bypass random drops and control loot farming.

# 🧩 Customization
You can modify the loot table to customize which items appear. The datapack uses standard Minecraft loot table mechanics, making it easy to tweak.

## 🛠️ Compatibility
✅ Minecraft 1.20+

✅ Works with Fabric, Forge, Vanilla, Realms, and Servers

❌ No external mods required

## 📦 Installation
Download and unzip the datapack.

Place the folder inside your world’s datapacks folder.


## 🗒️ Permissions & Settings
This pack does not require OP permissions to work. For tweaks, you can edit the dirt.json loot table manually.

#❤️ Support & Feedback
Join our Discord for support, ideas, or just to share your friends:
